eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 11:53 AM on APR 5, 2019 Effective until 3:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an Amber Alert. The St Charles Police Department has issued an Amber Alert for a child abduction that occurred at 2009 Santa Monica Street, St. Charles, MO between 10:30 and 11:00 AM on 04/05/2019. Abducted was Fernando Marez, hispanic, male, 3 and Alexia Marez, hispanic, female, 1.  Suspect vehicle is a tan 4 door passenger car, partial Illinois or Missouri registration e15.  Suspect is Fernando Marez, hispanic, male, 24, 5 feet 7 inches tall, 145 pounds, last seen wearing a black vest, blue t shirt, dark blue jeans and champion shoes.  The suspect physically assaulted the mother of the children and threatened to kill one of the children before leaving the scene westbound with another unknown hispanic male and female subject in the vehicle. If you see the suspect or vehicle, or if you have any information, immediately dial 9 1 1 to contact the nearest law enforcement agency.
